title: ERP Product Master — Bronze Source Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating raw ERP product master data from daily CSV files before ingestion into brz_freshsip.erp_products_raw. SCD Type 2 history is applied in the Silver layer. Changes to standard_cost_per_unit are tracked to ensure accurate historical gross margin calculations.

sku_id.description: Unique FreshSip product SKU identifier; business key for SCD Type 2 in Silver; referenced by all sales, inventory, and production records

product_name.description: Full product name as it appears in ERP and on the dashboard

product_category.description: Top-level product category; FreshSip has exactly four categories; used in all category-level KPI aggregations

product_subcategory.description: Subcategory within the product category; informational; not used in KPI grouping

brand.description: Brand name for this SKU; FreshSip may have multiple sub-brands

packaging_type.description: Primary packaging format for this SKU

package_size_ml.description: Package volume in milliliters; cast to INTEGER in Silver

standard_cost_per_unit.description: Standard cost per unit in USD as defined in ERP; critical for gross margin (KPI-S04) and inventory value calculations; changes trigger SCD Type 2 update in Silver; cast to DECIMAL

list_price.description: Standard list price per unit in USD; wholesale invoice price baseline; cast to DECIMAL in Silver

price_tier.description: Price tier classification for this SKU; used for segment-level analysis

is_active.description: Whether this SKU is currently active and available for sale; cast to BOOLEAN in Silver; inactive SKUs excluded from reorder alerts

record_effective_date.description: Date from which this version of the product record is effective; required for SCD Type 2 processing in Silver; cost or pricing changes on this date trigger a new version
